title: Spring in the City
subtitle: 初中示范课
summary: 围绕天气、出行和周末计划做句子学习。

sentences.en: The weather changes quickly in this city.
sentences.zh: 这座城市的天气变化很快。

sentences.en: I usually carry an umbrella in spring.
sentences.zh: 春天我通常会带一把伞。

sentences.en: My parents and I sometimes travel by underground.
sentences.zh: 我和父母有时乘地铁出行。

sentences.en: At night, we talk about our plans for the weekend.
sentences.zh: 到了晚上，我们会聊周末计划。
